ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., district, charter) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "total_budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "per_student_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated per student */,
  "school_size" TEXT /* Categorize schools by size (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "school_location" TEXT /* Categorize schools by location (e.g., urban, suburban, rural) */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email of the school principal */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the school's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the school record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the performance record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the performance metrics are recorded */,
  "average_math_score" TEXT /* Average math score for the school */,
  "average_reading_score" TEXT /* Average reading score for the school */,
  "passing_math_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of students passing math */,
  "passing_reading_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of students passing reading */,
  "overall_passing_rate" TEXT /* Overall passing rate for the school */,
  "graduation_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of students graduating */,
  "dropout_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of students dropping out */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of students to teachers */,
  "average_gpa" TEXT /* Average grade point average (GPA) of students */,
  "standardized_test_scores" TEXT /* JSON object detailing standardized test scores (e.g., SAT, ACT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the budget record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the budget is allocated */,
  "total_budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "federal_funding" TEXT /* Amount of federal funding received */,
  "state_funding" TEXT /* Amount of state funding received */,
  "local_funding" TEXT /* Amount of local funding received */,
  "total_expenditure" TEXT /* Total expenditure of the school */,
  "expenditure_categories" TEXT /* JSON object detailing expenditure categories (e.g., salaries, supplies, utilities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, educator, researcher) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user account creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
